claimText: The Climate Change Performance Index (CCPI) is published by Germanwatch, the New Climate Institute, and the Climate Action Network (CAN).
evidenceExcerpt: Published by Germanwatch, New Climate Institute, and Climate Action Network (CAN).
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the publishing organizations of the CCPI.

claimText: No country achieved the top three ranks in the Climate Change Performance Index (CCPI) 2026, making Denmark the highest-ranked country at 4th position.
evidenceExcerpt: No country achieved the top 3 ranks; Denmark is ranked highest at 4th.
examUse: Statement-based question testing knowledge of the top rankings and the unique feature of empty top 3 slots in the CCPI.
distractorHooks: Denmark secured the 1st rank in the CCPI 2026.
Sweden and Norway occupied the top two ranks.
The top 3 ranks were awarded to European Union countries.

claimText: India is ranked 23rd in the CCPI 2026 and has dropped from a high performer to a medium performer.
evidenceExcerpt: India ranks 23rd, dropping from a high performer to a medium performer.
examUse: Statement-based question assessing India's specific rank and performance category change in the latest CCPI.
distractorHooks: India is ranked in the top 10 of the CCPI 2026.
India improved its ranking to become a high performer.
India is categorized as a low performer in the CCPI 2026.

claimText: The CCPI measures climate performance across four specific categories: GHG Emissions, Renewable Energy, Energy Use, and Climate Policy.
evidenceExcerpt: Measures performance across 4 categories: GHG Emissions, Renewable Energy, Energy Use, and Climate Policy.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the exact parameters used to calculate the CCPI.

claimText: The CCPI evaluates 63 countries and the European Union, which together account for over 90% of global greenhouse gas emissions.
evidenceExcerpt: Evaluates 63 countries and the EU, covering over 90% of global GHG emissions.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope and coverage of the CCPI.
distractorHooks: Covers exactly 50% of global GHG emissions.
